subcodes.first_line: O offspring of the essence of heart and soul of His Holiness Khalil! What indeed if thou hadst been fashioned from elements of water and clay [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زاده عنصر جان و دل حضرت خلیل چه که اگر زاده عنصر آب و گل بودی در چنین یوم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude
